Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=email at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.doc: Scrolls an element or the page relative from current position by the given values.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=email at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Scroll To Element
kw.doc: This method waits for actionability checks, then tries to scroll element into view, unless it is completely visible.

kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Take Screenshot
Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.
Captured as 'screenshot.Take Screenshot' in Robot Framework. Saves to: [Project Root]/Web Playwright/screenshots/YYYY-MM-DD/

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: Cart total mismatch! Expected UI: R${formatted_ui_total}, Calculated: R${formatted_total}
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Captured as 'screenshot.Take Screenshot' in Robot Framework. Saves to: [Project Root]/Web Playwright/screenshots/YYYY-MM-DD/

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Cart total did not match UI
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
